metadata.significance: Shortest surah, promises Prophet abundance and tells him to pray and sacrifice

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِنَّآ أَعْطَيْنَـٰكَ ٱلْكَوْثَرَ

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, We have granted you, [O Muhammad], al-Kawthar.
translations.en_yusufali: To thee have We granted the Fount (of Abundance).
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami telah mengurniakan kepadamu (wahai Muhammad) kebaikan yang banyak (di dunia dan di akhirat).

translations.en_sahih: So pray to your Lord and sacrifice [to Him alone].
translations.en_yusufali: Therefore to thy Lord turn in Prayer and Sacrifice.
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu, kerjakanlah sembahyang kerana Tuhanmu semata-mata, dan sembelihlah korban (sebagai bersyukur).

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, your enemy is the one cut off.
translations.en_yusufali: For he who hateth thee, he will be cut off (from Future Hope).
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya orang yang bencikan engkau, Dia lah yang terputus (dari mendapat sebarang perkara yang diingininya).
